allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "java|dart|flutter|gradle|kotlin" } | Select-Object Id, Name, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($adb = \(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName; Write-Output "ADB: $adb"; if \($adb\) { & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 install -r c:\\dev\\woodpecker_chess\\build\\app\\outputs\\flutter-apk\\app-debug.apk })
PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell pm list packages | Select-String "woodpecker")

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell monkey -p com.woodpecker.chess -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell pidof com.woodpecker.chess; Write-Output "---LOGCAT--"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 logcat -d -t 300 | Select-String -Pattern "woodpecker|flutter|drift|sqlite|FATAL|AndroidRuntime" | Select-Object -Last 40)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell monkey -p com.woodpecker.chess -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell monkey -p com.woodpecker.chess -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $pid_ = & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell pidof com.woodpecker.chess; Write-Output "PID: $pid_"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 logcat -d -t 500 --pid=$pid_ 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Stockfish|stockfish|FATAL|AndroidRuntime|R8|missing_method|UnsatisfiedLinkError" | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($apk = "c:\\dev\\woodpecker_chess\\build\\app\\outputs\\flutter-apk\\app-release.apk"; if \(Test-Path $apk\) { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($apk\); $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 1MB } | Sort-Object -Property Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "{0,8:N1} MB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\), $_.FullName }; $zip.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("c:\\dev\\woodpecker_chess\\build\\app\\outputs\\flutter-apk\\app-arm64-v8a-release.apk"\); $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 500KB } | Sort-Object -Property Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 25 | ForEach-Object { "{0,8:N1} MB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\), $_.FullName }; $zip.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell monkey -p com.woodpecker.chess -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $pid_ = & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell pidof com.woodpecker.chess; Write-Output "PID: $pid_"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 logcat -d -t 1000 --pid=$pid_ 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FATAL|AndroidRuntime|gzip|sqlite|drift|woodpecker" | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\sebio\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell monkey -p com.woodpecker.chess -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $pid_ = & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 shell pidof com.woodpecker.chess; Write-Output "PID: $pid_"; & $adb -s 36291JEHN05094 logcat -d -t 1000 --pid=$pid_ 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FATAL|AndroidRuntime|drift|migration|sqlite" | Select-Object -Last 15)
